title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, restore defaults - it is returned to Bass
scenario: EQ setting resets to Bass instead of expected default after performing Restore Defaults in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Select an EQ preset (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ)
Close the Equalizer tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping down
expected: After Restore Defaults, the Equalizer should return to the default preset (Flat).
